name: Geometric deep learning and equivariant neural networks
snippet: 2023 · Cited by 140 — Abstract. We survey the mathematical foundations of geometric deep learning, focusing on group equivariant and gauge equivariant neural networks.

name: Alexander Schlichting - DGK
snippet: Jun 17, 2018 — Geometric loss functions for camera pose regression with deep learning. ... Neural Networks and Deep learning. Determination Press, Kap. 3 ...

name: Pointwise Geometric and Semantic Learning Network on 3D Point
snippet: We propose an end-to-end network for 3D shape analysis, named PointwiseNet, which combines pointwise low-level geometric and high-level semantic features. The network has the ability to classify and segment 3D models and does not require any pretraining.

name: Deep-Learning-MethodenzurErstellungvon 3D-Modellen MarkusPaschke

name: Mathematical Foundations of Geometric Deep Learning
snippet: Traditional deep learning models, operate on grid-like data (e.g., images, time series, text), but many real-world problems involve more complex, irregular geometries. In particular, the field focuses on analyzing neural networks based on the geometric priors they leverage.

name: Vector Neurons: A General Framework for SO (3)-Equivariant
snippet: Das Vector-Neurons-Framework führt eine allgemeine, leichtgewichtige Methode zum Aufbau SO (3)-äquivarianter neuronaler Netze für Punktwolken ein, indem latente Merkmale als 3D-Vektoren dargestellt werden.

name: Punktwolken-Klassifizierungsmodell trainieren (3D Analyst)
snippet: ArcGIS-Geoverarbeitungswerkzeug zum Trainieren eines Deep-Learning-Modells für die Punktwolkenklassifizierung.

name: Geometric deep learning and equivariant neural networks
snippet: This rapidly growing research field is referred to as geometric deep learning (Bronstein et al. 2017). In this introduction we shall provide a birds-eye view on the subject of geometric deep learning, with emphasis on the mathematical foundations.

name: Integration von Hyperspektraldaten in RandLA-Net zur
snippet: Da bisher keine Datensätze zur Segmentierung von hyperspektralen Punktwolken frei verfügbar sind, haben wir einen eigenen Datensatz erstellt, der manuell gelabelte Punkte enthält, um damit verschiedene Deep Learning Ansätze zu testen.
